objective: Make subagent packet templates and validation steer agents away from repeated tool-use failures: missing path reads, unsafe PowerShell line windows, and missing orchestration evidence source.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: Subagent packet template and checks encode concrete tool-use guard wording; tests prove weak/old guard wording is rejected and default templates pass; T0096 closeout has strict compact status evidence and workflow manifest.

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

commands: node --test --test-name-pattern "tool-use guard|subagent packet|missing machine evidence source|workflow-check" tools/taskboard/test.mjs

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
